lines.english: Lesson 103
lines.raw: Lesson 103 | 第103课

lines.english: The French test
lines.raw: The French test | 法语考试

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.english: How long did the exam last?
lines.raw: How long did the exam last? | 考试持续了多长时间？

lines.english: How was the exam, Richard?
lines.raw: How was the exam, Richard? | 考试怎么样，理查德？

lines.english: Not too bad.
lines.raw: Not too bad. | 不太糟。

lines.english: I think I passed in English and Mathematics.
lines.chinese: 我想我英语和数学都及格了。
lines.raw: I think I passed in English and Mathematics. | 我想我英语和数学都及格了。

lines.english: The questions were very easy.
lines.raw: The questions were very easy. | 题目很简单。

lines.english: How about you, Gary?
lines.raw: How about you, Gary? | 你怎么样，加里？

lines.english: The English and Maths papers weren't easy enough for me.
lines.chinese: 英语和数学试卷对我来说都不够简单。
lines.raw: The English and Maths papers weren't easy enough for me. | 英语和数学试卷对我来说都不够简单。

lines.english: I hope I haven't failed.
lines.raw: I hope I haven't failed. | 我希望我没考砸。

lines.english: I think I failed the French paper.
lines.raw: I think I failed the French paper. | 我想我法语没及格。

lines.english: I could answer sixteen of the questions.
lines.raw: I could answer sixteen of the questions. | 我能回答十六道题。

lines.english: They were very easy.
lines.raw: They were very easy. | 它们很简单。

lines.english: But I couldn't answer the rest.
lines.chinese: 但我回答不了剩下的题。
lines.raw: But I couldn't answer the rest. | 但我回答不了剩下的题。

lines.english: They were too difficult for me.
lines.raw: They were too difficult for me. | 它们对我来说太难了。

lines.english: French tests are awful, aren't they?
lines.chinese: 法语考试糟透了，不是吗？
lines.raw: French tests are awful, aren't they? | 法语考试糟透了，不是吗？

lines.english: I hate them.
lines.raw: I hate them. | 我讨厌它们。

lines.english: I'm sure I've got a low mark.
lines.raw: I'm sure I've got a low mark. | 我肯定我得了低分。

lines.english: Oh, cheer up!
lines.raw: Oh, cheer up! | 哦，振作起来！

lines.english: Perhaps we didn't do too badly.
lines.chinese: 也许我们考得没那么糟。
lines.raw: Perhaps we didn't do too badly. | 也许我们考得没那么糟。

lines.english: The guy next to me wrote his name at the top of the paper.
lines.chinese: 我旁边那个家伙在试卷顶部写了他的名字。
lines.raw: The guy next to me wrote his name at the top of the paper. | 我旁边那个家伙在试卷顶部写了他的名字。

lines.english: Yes?
lines.raw: Yes? | 然后呢？

lines.english: Then he sat there and looked at it for three hours!
lines.chinese: 然后他坐在那里看了三个小时！
lines.raw: Then he sat there and looked at it for three hours! | 然后他坐在那里看了三个小时！

lines.english: He didn't write a word!
lines.raw: He didn't write a word! | 他一个字也没写！
